principle: Expose QCAD-native CLI/script/action surfaces; do not rename them into semantic wrappers.

cli.description: Reads and stores settings to QCAD3.ini at the given path.
Sets the locale used by QCAD.
Opens following files with the explicitly given import filter.
Rescans scripts folder for new add-ons.
Forces reloading of scripts when they are used.
Prints action order information in menus.
Starts the given script file instead of scripts/autostart.js.
Executes the given script file directly after starting QCAD.
Runs without GUI / without X11 connection.
Uses GUI but does not display it.
Quits QCAD after executing the given script(s).
